# Upstream snapshot

- Repository: `https://github.com/bzz0309/bzz`
- Branch: `codex/music-prompt-library`
- Commit: `2d19e7c0f8b0db2afaed20e801d4dcde87613b28`
- Package version: `0.8.1`

This npm package includes only the compiled runtime and the two JSON files required by normal recommendations. Development scripts, benchmarks, candidates, governance data, and test dependencies are not shipped.

Before replacing this snapshot, run the upstream full test, build, benchmark, workflow, adapter, and confusion suites. Run `npm audit --omit=dev` and the wrapper test suite after integration.
